Class Win32LogicalDiskFFM.LogicalDiskInfo

java.lang.Object
oshi.driver.windows.wmi.Win32LogicalDiskFFM.LogicalDiskInfo
Enclosing class:
Win32LogicalDiskFFM
public static class Win32LogicalDiskFFM.LogicalDiskInfo extends Object
Represents a logical disk from WMI query result.
